notes: S138 closes the remaining primary read/projection surfaces across Jobs workflows, Review reviews, Observe analytics/library, and AI Management.
Jobs now prioritizes latest-run continuity, Review preserves deterministic governance-first CTA ordering, Observe drills cleanly into AI Management, and AI Management remains the sole control plane.
Cross-plane continuity is proven with one deterministic proof project and one explicit closure artifact rather than being implied across separate surface smokes.
